title: Japanese Chicken Yakitori
description: Grilled Japanese-style chicken skewers, marinated in a sweet soy sauce and sake mixture. Perfect for a quick and delicious snack or dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together portuguese, sake, golden, and crisp.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers.
Brush the grill or grill pan with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
